# Auto-generated NPI-efficacy ABC run metadata.
# source() this file to load the list `npi_run_metadata`.
# npi_spec maps npi_scaler in [-1, 1] -> efficacy:
#   efficacy = midpoint + npi_scaler * (max - min) / 2  (per fitted efficacy).
# Required by any downstream analysis that reconstructs efficacies from the fit.
#
# PROVENANCE: this fit (..._20260601_154658.rds) predates automatic metadata
# embedding. npi_spec here was reconstructed from DRC_run_abc_calibration.R as it
# stood at fit time (git: the commit immediately after the run did not change
# NPI_SPEC) and CONFIRMED by the analyst (cwhittaker@berkeley.edu) on 2026-06-02.
# Re-running the calibration now embeds this record automatically; edit here only
# if you later determine different ranges were actually used.
npi_run_metadata <- list(npi_spec = list(ppe_efficacy = list(min = 0.3, max = 0.9), etu_efficacy = list(min = 0.6, max = 0.95)), scenario_id = "Middle_DRC_ConflictSmoothed_PlusPlus", param_names = c("R0", "prop_funeral", "npi_scaler"), priors = list(c("unif", "1.25", "1.65"), c("unif", "0.10", "0.40"), c("unif", "-1.0", "1.0")), observed_summaries = c(takeoff = 1, n_deaths = 2299, n_hcw_deaths = 79, duration = 450), fixed_efficacies = list(general_hospital_quarantine_efficacy = 0.3, safe_funeral_efficacy = 0.8), created_at = "2026-06-02 (reconstructed)", note = "Reconstructed/confirmed; fit RDS predates automatic metadata embedding.")
